llII1Il="Anjay";local lIlI1Il={};local lI1I1I1=function(a,b)local p,c=1,0;while a>0 and b>0 do local ra,rb=a%2,b%2;if ra~=rb then c=c+p end;a,b,p=(a-ra)/2,(b-rb)/2,p*2 end;if a<b then a=b end;while a>0 do local ra=a%2;if ra>0 then c=c+p end;a,p=(a-ra)/2,p*2 end;return c end;local ll1l1I1=0;for i=1,#llII1Il do ll1l1I1=ll1l1I1+ll11lI1(llII1Il,i)end;for i=1,#lIII1I1 do local lllI1I1=lIII1I1[i];local l1lI1Il=ll11lI1(llII1Il,(i-1)%#llII1Il+1);local l1111I1=lI1I1I1(lllI1I1,l1lI1Il+(ll1l1I1%255));l1111I1=l1111I1-(i-1);while l1111I1<0 do l1111I1=l1111I1+256 end;table.insert(lIlI1Il,l111lIl(l1111I1%256));ll1l1I1=(ll1l1I1+lllI1I1)%255 end;local l1ll1lIl={};local lI1l1lI1=function()return"ll1l1lIl"end;local lI11lIl=(loadstring or load)(table.concat(lIlI1Il));if lI11lIl then lI11lIl()else print("Error")end
